topic: TITLES AND NAMES OF THE WICKED

Enemies of God —Ps 37:20;Jas 4:4.

Enemies of all righteousness —Ac 13:10.
Evil doers —Ps 37:1;1Pe 2:14.
Evil men —Pr 4:14;2Ti 3:13.
Evil generation —De 1:35.
Evil and adulterous generation —Mt 12:39.
Fools —Pr 1:7;Ro 1:22.
Froward generation —De 32:20
